title: Picking A Winner In Single Family Rental REITs
text: Single Family Rental REITs have outperformed all other REIT sectors thus far this year, and have also outperformed the S&P 500. Renting a house is currently much cheaper than buying a house, and the 38-42 year old renter cohort will grow faster than any other 5-year segment over the next decade. This article examines five Single Family Rental REITs to identify the best performer over the next 2-5 years, using liquidity ratio, growth in funds from operations (FFO), growth in total.

title: Invitation Homes Names Chief Investment Officer
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) announced today that Scott G. Eisen will join the Company as Executive Vice President and Chief Investment Officer in August. “At Invitation Homes, maintaining our lead as the nation's premier home leasing company means we are continually innovating through smart investments, superior operations, and building on our best-in-class team. title: Tech Companies Have Lots of News for Their Investors
Invitation Homes: Safer Alternative To Multifamily, But Expensive
text: Invitation Homes is one of only two publicly traded REITs focused on single family housing and can provide a safer alternative to multifamily REITs. I discuss the key differences that make single family much safer than multifamily and give you my outlook for the sector. I also present my reasoning why INVH stock is simply too expensive for me at this time.
